codes.description: JSON artifact payload is missing, malformed, or not an object.
codes.title: JSON_OBJECT_REQUIRED

codes.description: Artifact schema does not match required schema.
codes.title: SCHEMA_MISMATCH

codes.description: Artifact payload violates frozen grammar or required field contracts.
codes.title: ARTIFACT_INVALID

codes.description: Canonical hash binding comparison detected drift between authority artifacts.
codes.title: CROSS_ARTIFACT_HASH_MISMATCH

codes.description: Algorithm policy enum or key/algorithm binding rule was violated.
codes.title: ALGORITHM_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: Trust-anchor key lifecycle policy (revoked/expired) was violated.
codes.title: KEY_LIFECYCLE_POLICY_VIOLATION

codes.description: signature_verification_result@1 artifact is missing, malformed, or violates frozen grammar.
codes.title: SIGNATURE_VERIFICATION_RESULT_INVALID

codes.description: Signing diagnostic registry contract is missing or invalid.
codes.title: CONTRACT_REGISTRY_INVALID

codes.description: Signing rejection diagnostic payload violates frozen ordering/type rules.
codes.title: SIGNING_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC_INVALID

codes.description: Signature verification failed without required rejection diagnostic emission.
codes.title: VERIFICATION_FAILURE_WITHOUT_REJECTION_DIAGNOSTIC
